title: JSON Feed 1.1
description: Schema describing a JSON Feed 1.1 document per https://www.jsonfeed.org/version/1.1/. JSON Feed is a JSON-based syndication format served with the application/feed+json media type.

version.description: URL identifying the version of the JSON Feed format this document conforms to.

home_page_url.description: URL of the resource the feed describes — typically the homepage of the website. Strongly recommended for public feeds.

feed_url.description: URL of the JSON Feed document itself. Strongly recommended for public feeds (enables relocation).

description.description: Detail about the purpose of the feed.

user_comment.description: Description of the feed for humans viewing the source JSON.

next_url.description: URL of a paginated continuation of this feed.

icon.description: URL to an image (>= 512x512 recommended) representing the feed.

favicon.description: URL to a small icon (square, e.g. 64x64) for the feed.

authors.description: Authors of the feed. Replaces the singular 'author' from 1.0.

language.description: Primary language for the feed, as an RFC 5646 language tag.

expired.description: If true, the feed will not be updated in the future. Default false.

hubs.description: WebSub or similar hubs that subscribers can use for real-time notification of feed updates.

items.description: Items in the feed, ordered most recent first.

author.description: Author of a feed or item.
